strategy: Every fifth Round he casts Lifeblade, then follows with a Lifeblade treasure card the next Round, so he only meaningfully buffs on a slow cycle.
This gives you long, safe setup windows; stack your blades and Feints between his blade Rounds.
He resists Life 80% and takes 35% more from Fire and Death, so hit with Fire or Death, not Life.
Build up and land one big hit; he has no reactive cheats to punish your setup.
cheatNotes: Every fifth Round he casts Lifeblade, then follows with a Lifeblade treasure card the next Round.
